const validDomainsSchema = z
  .array(
    z
      .string()
      .min(4, t('error:invalid_between_num', { name: 'Domain', min: 4, max: maxLength.field }))
      .max(maxLength.field, t('error:invalid_between_num', { name: 'Domain', min: 4, max: maxLength.field }))
      .regex(/^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9.-]*\.[a-z0-9][a-z0-9.-]*[a-z0-9]$/i, { message: t('error:invalid_domain') })
      .superRefine(refineWithType((s) => /^[a-z0-9].*[a-z0-9]$/i.test(s) && s.includes('.'), 'invalid_domain'))
      .transform((str) => str.toLowerCase().trim()),
  )
  .optional();

const [createdTask] = await db
    .insert(taskTable)
    .values({
      projectId,
      userId: userId || null,
      title: title || "",
      status: resolvedStatus,
      columnId: column?.id ?? null,
      startDate: startDate || null,
      dueDate: dueDate || null,
      description: description || "",
      priority: resolvedPriority,
      number: nextTaskNumber + 1,
      position: nextPosition,
    })
    .returning();

const [updatedTask] = await db
    .update(taskTable)
    .set({
      title,
      status,
      columnId: column?.id ?? null,
      startDate: startDate || null,
      dueDate: dueDate || null,
      projectId,
      description,
      priority,
      position,
      userId: userId || null,
    })
    .where(eq(taskTable.id, id))
    .returning();

const scopesSection = scopes.length > 0 ? `

Requested Scopes

    ${scopes.map((scope) => `
  • ${escapeHtml(scope)}
    • `).join('\n ')}
` : ''

const swatchesHtml = defaultSwatches.map(color => `
    <button type="button"
            class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md border border-zinc-300 dark:border-zinc-600 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:ring-offset-1"
            style="background-color: ${color}"
            onclick="setColor('${name}', '${color}')"
            title="${color}">
    </button>
  `).join('')

return html`

Generating preview...

`
